name: No Fat Banana Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray 12 (2 1/2-inch) muffin cups with cooking spray.
2. In a medium bowl, combine flour, sugar, baking powder, baking soda, salt and cinnamon.
3. In a large bowl, using a fork or wire whisk, beat egg whites lightly.
4. Stir in mashed bananas, milk and corn syrup.
5. Add the flour mixture; stir until well blended.
6. Spoon into prepared muffin cups.
7. Bake in a 400°F oven for 22 to 25 minutes, or until firm to touch.
8. Cool in the pan for 5 minutes.
9. Remove from the pan and cool on a wire rack.
10. Makes 12 muffins. Per serving: 0g fat, 0 mg cholesterol, 130 calories, 200 mg sodium (less if you omit salt)
